flow_points: Nepal struggled in the Powerplay, scoring only 22 runs at a run rate of 3.67.
Nepal's innings faltered early, losing 3 wickets in the Powerplay itself.
West Indies had a strong start, scoring 44 runs for 1 wicket in their Powerplay (RR: 7.33).
JO Holder delivered a match-defining spell, claiming 4 wickets for 28 runs.
MW Forde provided crucial support with an economical spell of 1 wicket for 10 runs.
DS Airee anchored Nepal's innings, scoring 58 runs from 48 balls, contributing 43.6% of their total.
SD Hope then anchored West Indies' chase with an unbeaten 61 runs from 44 balls, contributing 45.5% of their total.
West Indies ultimately secured a dominant 9-wicket victory.
